mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on Print and Payment History page when a plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages, additional pages, progress bars, tooltips, and page count displays.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This batch contains only a test suite configuration matrix JSON file (test_suite_matrix.json) with no source code. No printer enrollment methods, API helpers, or setup utilities exist in this batch. Enrollment methods would be in page object files, helper files, or API utility modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No API helpers or subscription validation methods found in this batch. This batch contains only test configuration data, not executable code.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods or API helpers found in this batch. Only test suite configuration exists.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: No page objects, locators, or action methods found in this batch. This batch contains only JSON configuration data with no UI interaction code.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: Batch 18 contains a single file: test_suite_matrix.json, which is a test suite configuration matrix file defining test execution parameters for the AURA framework. This file contains 524 test configurations across 6 test suite categories (smoke, high_regression, medium_regression, low_regression, regression, regression_visual) with parameters like FLOW, MODE, STACK, LOCALE, PAYMENT_METHOD, PRINTER_PROFILE, TARGET platform, and REQUIREMENTS. This is purely a configuration/data file with no executable code, no page objects, no locators, no action methods, no verification methods, no API helpers, no constants, and no utility functions. Test case C44873414 requires: (1) Page objects for DashboardPage and PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage, (2) UI element locators for billing cycle card, progress bars, tooltips, info icons, value text displays, (3) Action methods for navigation, clicking, hovering, text retrieval, (4) Verification methods for visibility checks, text comparisons, CSS property validations, (5) API helpers for printer enrollment, subscription management, time manipulation, billing triggers, and page printing simulation, (6) Test data constants for URLs, page counts, expected values, and tooltip messages. None of these components can exist in a JSON configuration file. All relevant components for this test case would be found in Python source code files containing page objects, helper classes, utility modules, and API client implementations, which are not present in this batch. This batch is entirely irrelevant to the test case automation requirements.
